title: Alternate Realities: Archangel’s Plague Virus
description: Uncover the secrets of the mysterious beings known as Alternates — shapeshifting entities that distort worlds, create chaos, and alter reality itself.
body:
**_When Angels Fell, the Code of the World Began to Break_**

⚠️ Contains horror and supernatural themes, eerie sounds, and references to fictional mythological concepts.
Not based on real religions or historical figures.
Inspired by analog horror and cosmic storytelling.

**_Overview_****

Darkness spreads across the digital realm.
A strange infection has begun to twist the very code of the Minecraft world — spreading through dimensions, corrupting creatures, and giving rise to Alternates: entities that blur the line between human, machine, and spirit.

This mod explores the mystery of the Archangel’s Plague, a cosmic event that changed the balance between creation and chaos. The player becomes part of an unfolding story where every sound, every shadow, and every strange structure might hide a clue.

 **_The Alternates_**

Alternates are mysterious beings that appeared from unknown realms during the early formation of the Minecraft universe.

They are capable of mimicking the appearance of players or villagers, but their movements and voices are slightly distorted — like reflections in a cracked mirror. Each Alternate variant has unique traits:

 **_Standard Alternates_**: Common entities with human-like forms and eerie, shifting faces.

 **_N-Type Alternates_**: Faster and more unstable, capable of vanishing into light.

 **_Controllable Alternate Commanders_**: Intelligent leaders that can issue commands to other entities.

 **_Spectral Alternates_**: Energy-based versions that phase through blocks and distort nearby light.

When attacked, some Alternates emit disturbing frequencies or strange static-like noises, hinting at their non-physical origins.

 **_The Governments and Factions_**

In the wake of the plague, several governments and factions formed across the world:

 **_Authoritarian Regimes_**: Highly militarized factions that seek to weaponize Alternate energy. Their soldiers wear gas masks and follow strict orders.

 **_Independent Alliance_**: A coalition of free settlers, scientists, and survivors who aim to protect the natural world from both the plague and tyranny.

 **_Unknown Order_**: A secretive cult-like group believed to worship the fallen Archangel who started the plague.

Players can encounter camps, outposts, and hidden facilities belonging to each faction. Some may be hostile, others may trade or provide clues.

 **_The Archangel’s Legacy_**

At the heart of the corruption lies a celestial being — The Archangel — a figure of immense power who rebelled against the divine order of creation.
His presence warped reality itself, spawning the Alternates and the Plague Virus.
Ruined temples and dimensional cracks found throughout the world whisper of his name — though none dare speak it aloud.

Some say he sought to replace the Creator. Others believe he tried to restore balance that mortals could never understand.

 **_Features_**

🕳️ New Blocks:

Glitch Block – opens temporary rifts to hidden realms.

Corrupted Stone – spreads slowly through natural terrain.

Resonance Crystal – reacts to sound and light, used in crafting alternate-based tools.

👁️ New Mobs:

5 unique Alternate variants (each with custom AI, behavior, and animations).

Faction soldiers, commanders, and survivors.

Ambient spectral entities that appear rarely in fog.

🌍 New Dimension:

The Forsaken Forest – a fragmented, fog-filled dimension filled with decayed structures and secrets.

🔊 Sound Design:

Eerie ambient tones and distorted voices when near Alternate activity.

**_Lore & Style_**

The mod blends elements of cosmic horror, analog mystery, and dystopian survival.
It does not represent or promote any real religious belief — all angelic and divine themes are symbolic and purely fictional, designed to enrich the story atmosphere.
